description:
Model checking that gets issues solved

BIMcollab Zoom is the only model checking solution smoothly integrated with BIM coordination. Easily combine models, analyze object properties and find clashes faster than ever with intuitive model checking.
Find issues, communicate them and verify solutions. Visualize and share customized views with stakeholders and empower them to address design issues in the early stages of the project.
New Features
- Introduced support for Revit models in BIMcollab, enabling teams to view, collaborate, and perform model checking alongside IFC models across projects.
- Added support for Autodesk Forma integration, including document synchronization in your online BIMcollab project.
- Revit models can be loaded quickly when connecting to a project in BIMcollab Zoom, supporting fast model-based workflows.
- Issue fields can be automatically populated based on the last entry in BIMcollab Zoom. This is available on Windows.

Improvements
- Improved support for collaborating on issues imported from BCF 3.0 files.
- Updated underlying .NET components to improve performance.
- Enhanced the user interface for better compatibility on macOS Tahoe.

Bug Fixes
- Fixed a problem with IDS result grouping settings on Windows.
